ddls:
CREATE TABLE "search_algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm (e.g., Breadth-First Search) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the algorithm */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the algorithm (e.g., Uninformed Search, Informed Search) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the algorithm was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the algorithm was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Current version of the algorithm */,
  "documentation" TEXT /* Detailed documentation for the algorithm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "problem_domains" (
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each problem domain */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the problem domain (e.g., Puzzle, Game) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the problem domain */,
  "complexity" TEXT /* Complexity of the problem domain */,
  "description_extended" TEXT /* Extended description of the problem domain */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("domain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm run */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm used in the run */,
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the problem domain where the algorithm was applied */,
  "node_expansions" INTEGER /* Number of node expansions during the run */,
  "goal_tests" INTEGER /* Number of goal tests during the run */,
  "time_elapsed" REAL /* Time elapsed during the run in seconds */,
  "solution_length" INTEGER /* Length of the solution found */,
  "run_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the algorithm run */,
  "run_environment" TEXT /* Environment where the algorithm was run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_runs_domain_id FOREIGN KEY ("domain_id") REFERENCES problem_domains ("domain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_runs_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES search_algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "activity_level" INTEGER /* Activity level of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm version */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm this version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_versions_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES search_algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discussions" (
  "discussion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discussion */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm being discussed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the message */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message posted by the user */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the message was posted */,
  "discussion_title" TEXT /* Title of the discussion */,
  "discussion_category" TEXT /* Category of the discussion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discussion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discussions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discussions_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES search_algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm involved in the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_history_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES search_algorithms ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., Time Complexity, Space Complexity) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the metric (e.g., time complexity, space complexity) */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric (e.g., seconds, bytes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_metric_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric value */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm this value belongs to */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric this value represents */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "value_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the metric value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_metric_values_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES search_algorithms ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_metric_values_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_comparisons" (
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comparison */,
  "algorithm1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first algorithm in the comparison */,
  "algorithm2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second algorithm in the comparison */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric used in the comparison */,
  "result" REAL /* Result of the comparison */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comparison_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_comparisons_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_comparisons_algorithm2_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm2_id") REFERENCES search_algorithms ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_comparisons_algorithm1_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm1_id") REFERENCES search_algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)
